title: SCA — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC School Construction Authority (SCA) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the SCA Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nycsca.org, and the vendor-facing bidset SharePoint portal. Includes the NYC geography spine plus SCA's own project/building keys (Building ID/BIN, DSF Number, BBL) and the DOE/SCA Geographic (School) District dimension.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across SCA project datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government.

councilDistrict.description: NYC Council district ('Council District' / 'City Council Districts').

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code ('Neighborhood Tabulation Area (NTA) (2020)').

GeographicDistrict.description: DOE/SCA Geographic (Community School) District — SCA's primary programmatic geography, districts 1-32 plus citywide District 75 ('Geographic District' / 'Geographical District' / 'Geo Dist').

ProjectReference.description: A reference to an SCA capital project / school building by its numbering keys.

schoolName.description: School / project name ('School Name' / 'Project School Name').

buildingId.description: SCA Building Identifier ('Building ID' / 'Project Building Identifier').

dsfNumber.description: Design Services Firm / project number ('DSF Number(s)').

projectNumber.description: SCA project number ('Project #' / 'Upcoming Project Design Number').

Money.description: A monetary amount that may arrive as a number or a formatted/ranged string (e.g. a budget range).
